title: Kame Life Guide - Research Products Master
description: Phase 39-P1-Step3: schema for the 750-item research/candidate product master DB. This is NOT the production schema used by data/products.js. No URL fields are defined here on purpose - real affiliate URLs are only added when a candidate is individually verified and promoted to products.js (see docs/products-master-policy.md).

id.description: Research-master ID namespace, distinct from production product.js ids (e.g. 'enclosure_wood_90'). Format RM0001..

category.description: Aligned with the category slugs already used in data/products.js, plus 'water_dish' which does not yet exist in production.

subcategory.description: Free-form subtype within category, e.g. enclosure: cage|tank, heating: heater|thermostat, lighting_uvb: t5|t8|compact|mvb|led.

target_species_type.description: Free-form species/habitat tags. Where possible reuse EQUIPMENT_MAP keys from data/products.js (e.g. tortoise_dry_small, semi_aquatic_small, box_turtle) to ease future promotion.

tank_size.description: Applicable tank/cage size context (e.g. '60cm'); null when not size-specific (e.g. food, supplements).

price_band.description: 'unknown' is valid at research stage before a real price has been confirmed.

amazon_status.description: 'pending' = not yet researched, 'search' = candidate identified but no confirmed product page, 'available' = a real, verified Amazon product page/ASIN exists. Mirrors rakutenStatus semantics already used in data/products.js.

availability_status.description: Japan-market availability confidence, roughly corresponding to the 日本入手性 column in equipment-db-750.csv.
